title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates
company: Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates:
Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vishal Mega Mart Asia Pacific Associates!
